name: ua-defense-tracker
title: UA AirDefense Tracker — Ukraine air defense aggregated data
description: Daily reports of aerial threats (UAVs, cruise missiles, ballistic missiles) launched at Ukraine and confirmed interceptions by Ukrainian air defence forces. Aggregated from the official daily bulletins of the Air Force Command of the Armed Forces of Ukraine (Повітряні сили ЗСУ), normalized into a structured time series. Coverage starts October 2022.

licenses.name: ODC-BY-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Attribution License v1.0

sources.title: Air Force Command of the Armed Forces of Ukraine — daily bulletins
Massive Missile Attacks on Ukraine — Kaggle CSV mirror

fields.name: model
fields.description: Weapon model(s) reported in the window. May contain multiple models joined with 'and'.

fields.name: launched
fields.description: Number of weapons of the listed model(s) launched in the window.

fields.name: destroyed
fields.description: Number reported as intercepted, suppressed or otherwise neutralized.

fields.name: not_reach_goal
fields.description: Number reported as not reaching their target (jammed, lost, crashed).

fields.name: still_attacking
fields.description: Number still in flight at the end of the window.

fields.name: is_shahed
fields.description: Convenience flag for Shahed-family loitering munitions.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Permalink fragment of the upstream AFU bulletin.
